story.text:
# 💡 C76 · UOR-Relational Instantiation
**concept** · shared · knowledge

Classifying rel(a,b) is strictly more expressive for sovereignty than object-only modelling; the authorization obstruction attaches to the relation independent of the relata. Active (30%).
